Tools (+ Discounts)
This is a resources section to list the tools I use and any discounts where I can get them
for you!
Facebook
Goodies
Ad sizes and specs – a guide split by campaign objective to show what’s
possible and potential sizes for each ad type
Case Studies – gain inspiration from what other successful advertisers
have achieved with Facebook ads
Creative Tips – some basic but useful advice on getting the best out of
your creatives
Facebook Pixel Implementation Guide – Intermediate to advanced guide
on setting up pixels and using standard events
Pixel Setup: Mapping Dynamic Ads to your Product Catalogue – a guide
to tagging your pixel (website or app) to match key page views back to
products in your product catalogue
Partners: how to add a Partner to your Page and/or Advert account – a
question I get asked often!
FREE Creative Apps & Tools - A list I've compiled up for you to use in your
ads campaign right now
ClickFunnels
(+discount)
WHAT: ClickFunnels is a landing page, funnel, membership and affiliate
membership platform all in one
WHY: I use ClickFunnels for my landing pages and funnels, this
membership area and to manage my affiliates. It's saved a tonne of time
and money and whilst there may be alternatives out there if you just
want a single landing page it's done a pretty good job for me!
I also use it for my dropship, once I've found a winning product with
potential to scale from a general merchandise store I'll pull it into its
own URL and land people on a CF page.
OFFER: 14 Day Free Trial + once purchased through the link below I can
send you Ecommerce product/one page landers from my other projects
and any of my landing pages as templates to reuse if you wish.
LINK: Sign up here
Dotcom &
Expert Secrets
(Books)
(+discount)
WHAT: Dotcom & Experts Secrets are the books which bring together a
decade of learning on how to pitch and sell your product whether
physical or digital and build a following.
WHY: I attribute a big part of my success in building a brand, following
and this training program to the learnings from Dotcom Secrets.
I read these every few months and always manage to find something
new to help my agency and personal projects to grow faster and better. I
can't recommend this enough!
OFFER: Free + Shipping
LINK: Dotcom Secrets click here | Experts Secret click here
Delighted 	WHAT: A customer satisfaction tool which allows you to calculate NPS
(Net Promoter Score), a simple method of gauging satisfaction with your
business and CSAT which is another method of gauging satisfaction.
WHY: Especially for Ecom store owners, Facebook are surveying your
customers anyway, so why not take control and do it yourself BEFORE
Facebook does? I use it and recommend it for any business owner. Send
30 days after their purchase to see whether they'd recommend your
business to others.
OFFER: None
LINK: Sign up here

Hotjar 	WHAT: Track website visitors using heatmaps, recordings of their
mouse/clicks, launch polls, building mini funnels and surveys.
WHY: It's an integral part of my Conversion Rate Optimisation toolkit to
give me insights and directions on improving website performance, thus
improving CPA/L/R and ROAS.
OFFER: None
LINK: Sign up here
Revealbot
(+discount)
WHAT: Automation for Facebook ads, including pausing, restarting,
budget and bid changes plus integrating with tools like Slacks for alerts
(eg no ads running in an ad set due to rules)
WHY: Used daily for my personal and agency clients to automate
repetitive tasks such as optimisation, pausing promotions at a certain
time and rules based scaling.
OFFER: 30% Discount for the first 6 months with
code depeshmastermind
LINK: Sign up here
Supermetrics
(+discount)
WHAT: Used to pull data from Facebook (ads, page) and other tools
(Google Analytics, Adwords etc)
WHY: I pull data from Facebook ads API using Supermetrics to maintain
30 minute interval updates on my data, so I don't need to keep checking
in on account performance and to deep dive creating different views of
the data.
OFFER: 10% Discount off any package
LINK: Sign up here
Trello 	WHAT: A project and task management tool
WHY: Used within my agency to manage testing
OFFER: None
